creator: nutboy@csocs.com
text:
Apache 1.3.9 with MS Frontpage 2000 Extensions, PHP3.0.12, 
and mod_ssl 2.2.4.  Also builds mySQL322-client for PHP3.

How-To-Repeat: 
uudecode -p < apache13-php3-fp-modssl.shar.tar.Z | zcat | tar xfv -
mkdir /usr/ports/www/apache13-php3-fp-modssl
cd /usr/ports/www/apache13-php3-fp-modssl
sh /where/your/shar/is/apache13-php3-fp-modssl.shar
OR: port tarball is availible at ftp://ftp.csocs.com/pub/FreeBSD/ports/
